purpose: Map every possible RLL evidence/governance outcome to deterministic operational actions.

rules.meaning: The current result table does not support a positive RLL claim, or a required governance gate failed.
rules.allowed_wording: Nesta rodada, o claim positivo do RLL está bloqueado; o relatório deve explicar o motivo, comparar com CPL e registrar TOKEN_VAZIO/PENDING onde aplicável.
required_actions: keep positive superiority wording blocked
publish only negative/diagnostic interpretation
run or schedule H0/r_d ablation if H0_all_equal is true
report Delta AICc/BIC vs CPL
report Os0/zt/wt and whether Os0 collapsed
mark missing covariance, Pantheon, CMB or growth blocks as TOKEN_VAZIO/PENDING
rules.release_policy: Do not publish as discovery. Allow only audit/diagnostic report.
rules.close_or_update_issues: Keep #420/#421/#422/#423 open unless the blocking reasons are fully resolved by new artifacts.

rules.meaning: RLL is not worse than CPL by scanned AICc/BIC criteria in this table, but stronger academic gates remain.
rules.allowed_wording: RLL não é pior que CPL nesta tabela pelos critérios escaneados; o resultado é limitado e ainda depende de covariância, ablação, MCMC e benchmark físico.
required_actions: label the result PASS_LIMITED, not confirmed
run H0/r_d ablation and rescan every ablation CSV
materialize covariance policies before strong claim
run MCMC/nested sampling before publication-grade inference
run CLASS/CAMB or keep growth claim blocked
required_artifacts: covariance manifests and hashes for used datasets
rules.release_policy: Allow limited methodological/preprint wording; block discovery wording.
rules.close_or_update_issues: Update #421/#423 with ablation scans; keep #420/#422 open until registry-derived k and report wiring are complete.

rules.meaning: Some calculation exists, but covariance, baseline, dataset, registry or benchmark coverage is incomplete.
rules.allowed_wording: Resultado parcial: há cálculo, mas a interpretação fica limitada por lacunas explícitas de covariância, baseline, dataset ou benchmark.
required_actions: state every missing block explicitly
separate computed values from TOKEN_VAZIO
avoid ranking claims if CPL or covariance is missing
add missing dataset/covariance manifests before rerun
rules.release_policy: Allow internal report only unless limitations are front-page visible.
rules.close_or_update_issues: Open/update issue for each missing block; do not close governance issues.

rules.meaning: There is not enough evidence to calculate the requested claim safely.
rules.allowed_wording: TOKEN_VAZIO: não há evidência computacional suficiente para responder sem inventar resultado.
required_actions: stop claim generation
identify missing file, dataset, covariance, baseline or run
create a reproducibility task before interpretation
required_artifacts: issue with exact missing artifact path
rules.release_policy: No scientific claim. Only gap ledger.
rules.close_or_update_issues: Create or update issue with missing evidence; keep claim blocked.

rules.meaning: A governance script, registry, schema, N-k-dof, JSON or report-language check failed.
rules.allowed_wording: A auditoria falhou; nenhum claim científico deve ser emitido até correção do gate.
required_actions: fix the failing gate
rerun registry validator and evidence scanner
record the failed command and exact error
rules.release_policy: Block release/report claim until audit passes.
rules.close_or_update_issues: Open/update audit-failure issue; do not close root governance issue.

rules.meaning: Governance metadata exists, but the actual cosmological run or ablation fit has not been executed.
rules.allowed_wording: PENDING: a matriz/rota existe, mas o fit cosmológico ainda não foi executado para esta política.
required_actions: execute the ablation or mark as pending
do not overwrite prior evidence without run_id
scan each generated CSV independently
rules.release_policy: Allow roadmap/status only; block result interpretation.
rules.close_or_update_issues: Keep #423 open until ablation CSVs exist and are scanned.
